description_long: This is a pair of metal pliers with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring two elongated handles coated in a light-colored material, likely for improved grip and comfort. The jaws are made of dark metal and have a pronounced, slightly curved cutting edge, suggesting they are designed for snipping or shearing rather than gripping. The pivot joint is secured with visible bolts, and a spring mechanism is present to assist in opening the handles automatically after each squeeze. The handles are straight and appear to be coated with a smooth, possibly painted or enameled finish. A metal latch is attached near the base of the handles, likely serving as a locking mechanism to keep the pliers closed when not in use. The overall construction is sturdy, with all parts tightly fitted, making it suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban maintenance or repair settings.
description: A sturdy pair of metal pliers with light-colored, straight handles and dark, curved cutting jaws, featuring a spring and locking latch for secure use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the pliers, with the jaws aligned and the handles appearing slim.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open, curved jaws and the full length of the straight handles, as well as the pivot and latch mechanism.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the thickness of the jaws and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the jaws, the spring mechanism, and the locking latch more clearly.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, coated handles with a smooth, slightly contoured design for grip comfort.
attribute_jaw_design: Curved, shearing jaws with a sharp cutting edge, optimized for snipping rather than gripping; no serrations or notches visible.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot with a visible bolt and integrated spring mechanism for automatic opening; includes a locking latch for securing the handles.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth, painted or enameled surface with no visible ribbing or knurling.
